shared_properties: Prisoner silhouette stays inside 16x24 px with the cuffed wrists, cropped hair, and orange shoulder stripe preserved.
Core palette metadata remains primary #3B3347, background #0D0D0F, and accent #E07B39 while the hit flash color stays inside specs.colors_hex.
The pose remains aligned to the downward centerline so invulnerability feedback can swap in without shifting collision perception.
differences: Two frames alternate between a normal outline and a red-tinted flash overlay that covers at least 65% of occupied pixels.
The torso shakes laterally by 2 px between frames to reinforce the 4 px screen-shake event described in the GDD.
Hands open and knees spread by 1 px to convey damage impact instead of controlled descent.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 0.2 second damage flash, 1.5 second invulnerability window, and no-knockback hit response for the player sprite.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the oppressive dungeon contrast so the hit flash can spike against a dark shaft without over-brightening the scene.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the prisoner base silhouette so the hurt sheet remains recognizably the same character during impact.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with TextureAtlasLayout and a fixed-step animation timer driven by Bevy 0.13 FixedUpdate.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load through AssetServer during a Loading state, register the atlas handle by task_id and asset_key, and keep animation metadata in a typed DescentActorVisual resource.
runtime_notes: Advance frames at the authored fps inside FixedUpdate so movement logic and animation cadence stay locked at 60 FPS.
Use flip_x for mirrored wall contact instead of authoring an extra right-facing sheet.
Snap the actor Transform to whole pixels after motion integration so the 16x24 silhouette stays crisp on the 4x upscale.

context.usage: Player visual used immediately after spike or saw contact.

impact_notes: Flash frame replaces mid-tone cloth pixels with #8B2020 and #F5A623 accents.
Frame offset alternates between x0 and x2 within the 16 px width to support a jitter effect.
Head remains fully inside the canvas so the hurt sheet does not clip during rapid swaps.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 32x24 px with 2 frames of 16x24 px and 0 px spacing.
Flash cadence supports a visible 12 fps alternation and the bright frame covers at least 65% of occupied pixels with damage hues.
Character identity stays readable after tinting and no anti-aliased blends appear.
